<!-- Generated by perf/build_final_report.py -->

# ACE-Step v1.5 — Tensor Parallelism & Mesh Parallelism: Final Report

Branch `ign/ACE_tp4`. Everything is **default-OFF and flag-gated** — the stock replicate/1×1
pipeline is byte-identical unless a flag is set.

## 1. What was implemented

| Area | What | Flag | Status |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| **DiT tensor-parallel** | MLP (col gate/up + row down) & attention (head-parallel QKV + row o_proj), all-reduce; full block | `ACE_STEP_TP=on` (2-way) / `=4` (4-way) | ✅ done, PCC-validated, committed |
| **Foundation** | `tp_config.py` (mappers, collectives, readback), fabric-enable at mesh open, TP-safe device-0 readback, eager-TP warning | — | ✅ committed |
| **Encoder tensor-parallel** | shared `_TtQwen3EncoderLayer`+`TtQwen3EncoderMLP` → covers detokenizer + Qwen3 caption encoder + condition encoder | `ACE_STEP_TP` | ✅ code + isolated PCC=1.0; **inert** until Phase-A-on-mesh |
| **VAE time/data-parallel decode** | `decode_tiled` batches N tiles/round, shards batch across mesh; each chip decodes one tile | `ACE_STEP_VAE_TIME_PARALLEL=1` | ✅ done, PCC=1.0, **4.3× measured** |
| **Phase-A-on-mesh (wiring)** | `open_preprocess_device`→mesh + skip DiT reexec (run both phases on one mesh) | `ACE_STEP_PREPROCESS_ON_MESH=1` | ⚠️ wiring done; module tuned-configs block full run |

## 2. Correctness (PCC vs replicate baseline, real BH_QB 2×2 mesh)

| Unit | 2-way | 4-way |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Collective round-trip (G0) | 1.000000 | 1.000000 |
| DiT MLP | 0.999988 | — |
| DiT attention (self / cross) | 0.999992 | — |
| Full DiT block | 0.999325 | 0.999212 |
| Qwen3 encoder layer (detok/caption/condition) | 1.000000 | 1.000000 |
| VAE time-parallel decode vs sequential | 1.000000 | — |

## 3. Key performance findings

- **DiT TP is latency-neutral-to-slightly-positive with `--use-trace`, a large regression eager.**
  Eager TP ≈ 2.5× slower on the DiT (un-amortised CCL launch); trace replay recovers it. **Always
  run TP with `--use-trace`.**
- **DiT TP has a duration crossover** (base/sft, trace): 15s → slower, 30s → ~break-even,
  **60s → TP2 ~27% faster on DiT and ~4–5% faster wall**. Longer sequences amortise the collectives.
- **4-way < 2-way on latency** (more collective traffic) but gives ¼ weights/chip vs ½.
- **VAE time-parallel is the biggest win: 4.3× VAE decode, −32% wall at 60s** (VAE was ~39% of wall
  at 60s), bit-identical audio. TP (conv sharding) was the wrong tool for the VAE (framework-blocked
  by `prepare_conv_weights`); data/time-parallel decode sidesteps it entirely.
- **Net:** DiT TP's value is mostly **memory** (½ or ¼ weights/chip) + a modest long-form speedup;
  the VAE time-parallel is the real throughput win. The mesh (even replicate) already beats P150 by
  ~2.5–3× at 30/60s because P150's single-chip DiT/VAE scale badly with sequence length.

## 4. How to enable

```bash
# DiT tensor-parallel (recommended: 2-way + trace = parity + half DiT weights/chip)
ACE_STEP_TP=on   ... --mesh-device BH_QB --use-trace ...
ACE_STEP_TP=4    ... --mesh-device BH_QB --use-trace ...     # 4-way: quarter weights, slower
# VAE time-parallel decode (the 4.3x win) — compose with the above
ACE_STEP_VAE_TIME_PARALLEL=1 ...
```

## 5. Not done / blocked (deferred, documented)

- **5 Hz LM on mesh** — stock `tt_transformers` shard-grid-fit `TT_FATAL` on BH 2×2 (not our code).
- **Phase-A modules under TP** — the tuned sharded mem/program configs (block-sharded norms,
  width-sharded matmuls) assume non-TP dims and `TT_FATAL` under TP; each needs TP-dim-awareness.
  The core matmul sharding is correct (isolated PCC=1.0); the surrounding tuned configs are not.
- **VAE tensor-parallel (conv)** — intentionally skipped; `prepare_conv_weights` has no cross-mesh
  weight shard. Time-parallel decode replaces it.

## 6. Benchmark dataset

Each config has sub-columns **Wall s · DiT s · VAE s · RTF×** (RTF higher = faster). All BH_QB runs use `--use-trace`.
P150 = single-chip replicate (TP auto-off). Per-variant steps/guidance: turbo 8/1, base & sft 50/7.
Prompt: "guitar, saxophone and prominent drums with clear kick and snare".
